---
title: "Research"
---

# Research

## Working Papers

### Boxer Rebellion Memory and State Response in Modern China

This paper studies the long-run effects of historical social conflict on nationalism, collective action, and government behavior in China.

### The Great Depression and Entry into Scientific Careers

This paper studies whether local economic shocks during the Great Depression influenced entry into scientific occupations.

### Literacy, Information Diffusion, and the Meiji Restoration in Tokugawa Japan

This project examines whether literacy and private education contributed to political mobilization and modernization in Tokugawa Japan.
